en.question: A train 200 meters long passes a pole in 10 seconds. What is its speed in km/h?

hi.question: 200m लंबी रेलगाड़ी खंभे को 10 सेकंड में पार करती है। चाल (km/h)?

en.question: A train 300m long running at 54 km/h will take how long to cross a bridge 200m long?
en.explanation: Speed = 54 x 5/18 = 15 m/s. Total distance = 500m. Time = 500/15 = 33.33 seconds.

hi.question: 300m रेलगाड़ी, 54 km/h, 200m पुल पार करने में समय?

en.question: A car covers a certain distance at 60 km/h and returns at 40 km/h. What is the average speed for the entire journey?

hi.question: 60 km/h से जाकर 40 km/h से लौटे। औसत चाल?

en.question: A train 150 meters long running at 72 km/h crosses a platform in 25 seconds. What is the length of the platform?

hi.question: 150m रेलगाड़ी, 72 km/h, प्लेटफॉर्म 25 सेकंड में पार। प्लेटफॉर्म की लंबाई?

en.question: A man can row at 12 km/h in still water. If it takes him 3 hours more to row 48 km upstream than downstream, find the speed of the stream.

hi.question: शांत जल में 12 km/h, धारा के प्रतिकूल 48km में 3 घंटे अधिक। धारा की चाल?

en.question: Two trains of lengths 120 m and 180 m are running in opposite directions at 60 km/h and 48 km/h. How long will they take to cross each other?
en.explanation: Relative speed = 108 km/h = 30 m/s. Total distance = 300m. Time = 300/30 = 10 seconds.

hi.question: 120m और 180m की रेलगाड़ियाँ विपरीत दिशा में 60,48 km/h से। पार करने में समय?
hi.explanation: सापेक्ष चाल=30 m/s, दूरी=300m, समय=10 सेकंड।

en.question: Walking at 5/6 of his usual speed, a man reaches his office 10 minutes late. What is his usual time?
en.explanation: Speed ratio=5/6, time ratio=6/5. Time increase=1/5 of usual=10 min. Usual=50 min.

hi.question: सामान्य चाल के 5/6 पर चलकर 10 मिनट देर से। सामान्य समय?

en.question: A boat goes 30 km upstream and 44 km downstream in 10 hours. If it goes 40 km upstream and 55 km downstream in 13 hours, find the speed of the boat in still water.

hi.question: 30km ऊर्ध्वप्रवाह+44km अनुप्रवाह=10 घंटे, 40+55=13 घंटे। शांत जल में चाल?
